item.title: The US$500m question: How prediction markets ‘called’ the Iran bombing before it happened
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)
SINGAPORE, March 2 — Betting payouts following US attacks on Iran have thrown new scrutiny on prediction markets,...
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), election(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3), breach(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Goldman’s Solomon says markets may need ‘a couple of weeks’ to absorb Iran war impact
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)
Solomon surprised at muted market reactionProbability US economy will run ‘a little bit hot’ this yearAI cou...
Matched: war(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3)

item.title: Goldman CEO says markets may take a ‘couple of weeks’ to digest Iran war impact
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon says markets tend to react in a muted way to geopolitical events unless they have a direct impact on economic growth.
Matched: war(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3)

item.title: China’s consumers scout lower prices, secondhand goods as spending sputters
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
A longstanding taboo in Chinese culture against used goods is lifting rapidly amid stagnating wages, youth unemployment and a years-long property crisis.
Matched: breaking(+3), law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Wall Street ends lower as Middle East conflict fans inflation fears
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Investors are growing anxious about the war’s duration and its impact on energy markets as oil extends sharp gains.
Matched: policy(+3), law(+3), war(+3), inflation(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: X suspends revenue sharing for undisclosed AI war videos
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
The policy change targets a threat to information authenticity amid the ongoing war between the US, Israel and Iran.
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), acquisition(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Wall St futures fall as Middle East conflict stokes inflation worries
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
With the Strait of Hormuz closed to marine traffic, a surge in oil prices could quickly seep into the broader economy.
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: EU to lay out local content rules to strengthen manufacturing
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
The EU plans to introduce low-carbon, 'Made in Europe' requirements for strategic sectors, though critics warn it could spark protectionism.
Matched: parliament(+2), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Airline, travel industries scramble with fallout from Middle East conflict
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Major Gulf hubs have closed, 21,300 flights have been cancelled leaving passengers stranded, while airline shares tumble and oil prices surge squeezing profits.
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2), covid(+2)

item.title: Iran conflict threatens Gulf tourism, undermining years of investment
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Analysts peg a potential US$56 billion hit as the war puts the region’s image as a safe, high-end vacation destination at risk.
Matched: budget(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2), covid(+2)

item.title: US stocks cut losses after Trump announces steps to safeguard Hormuz Strait

Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)
US stocks cut losses after Trump announces steps to safeguard Hormuz StraitNEW YORK, March 4 — US equities joined...
Matched: war(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: US blames Live Nation for ‘broken’ music ticket system
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
With a federal lawsuit, the US government is seeking to break up the concert promoter that also controls ticketing giant Ticketmaster.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Asia scrambles for LNG as Qatar halts output due to Iran war
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
US, Israeli strikes on Iran have choked tanker traffic, halted Qatari LNG output, of which more than 80% is exported to Asia.
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Wall Street ends narrowly mixed, trading volatile after air strikes on Iran
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)
NEW YORK, March 3 — US stocks ended close to flat yesterday after a volatile session that saw shares drop early fo...

item.title: Indonesian media report Fitch cuts country’s rating outlook from stable to negative as officials seek confirmation
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)
Deltik.com says Fitch BBB rating maintained, outlook revised on policy uncertaintyFitch declines to comment on reportsMo...

item.title: Seoul briefly halts trade after 12pc plunge as Asian stocks reel from Iran war, oil surge
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)
HONG KONG, March 4 — Seoul shares collapsed more than 12 per cent as Asian equity markets were hit by panic sellin...
Matched: war(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: CIMB denies data breach involving 1.2mil records
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
The banking group says its security teams have verified that all systems are safe amid online claims of a data leak.
Matched: ai(+3), cybersecurity(+3), breach(+3)

item.title: Asian stocks tumble further, oil extends gains as inflation fears grow
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
The continued crude supply disruptions from the Middle East risk undermining hopes for further monetary easing.
Matched: war(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Amazon delays, rising prices and stranded tankers: How the Hormuz shutdown is already hitting consumers
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)
Around 20 per cent of the world’s seaborne oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz, making it vital to global energ...
Matched: war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Indian basmati held up at ports, in transit as Iran war halts new deals
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Freight rates have more than doubled since the US and Israel attacked Iran, says trade officials.
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: India most vulnerable to prolonged disruptions to Middle East oil, analysts say
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)
MUMBAI, March 3 — India, a fast-growing oil consumer, is the country most vulnerable to crude supply shocks if the...

item.title: Media reports Fitch cuts Indonesia’s rating outlook to negative
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Investigative and mainstream outlets cite rising uncertainty and policy credibility concerns as the reason for the downgrade.
Matched: policy(+3), ministry(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Seoul slump leads Asian stock rout as markets brace for energy shock
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Investors dumped crowded positions in chipmakers on worries the Middle East war will drive an oil shock that raises inflation and delays interest rate cuts.
Matched: war(+3), inflation(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: US banks on high alert for cyberattacks as Iran war escalates
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
While no major disruption was reported, smaller-scale DDoS and ransomware attacks have disrupted parts of the market.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), cybersecurity(+3)
